---
title: "taste.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/sentinel/wardens/taste.py"
loc: 55
complexity: 10
logic_score: 1.90
style_score: 3.78
intel_score: 5.76
overall_score: 3.95
---

## Intent
Autonomous neural guardian monitoring system drift and anomalies.

## Interaction Protocol
Instantiate the Warden class and call evaluate(graph) with a compiled matrix graph.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 1.9/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 5.8/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 13 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [re](file://re)
- [typing](file://typing)
- [src.sentinel.wardens.base](file://src.sentinel.wardens.base)

### Exports
- `TasteWarden`
- `scan`
